_meta.purpose: Local SEO sentences for Brite Smile Dental Care in Hinglish. Engine picks MAX 1 per review. Full natural sentences that carry searchable terms — NOT keyword stuffing.
rules: Must read like something a real patient would write
Nearby areas can be mentioned naturally: Aishbagh, Naka Hindola, Alambagh, Hazratganj, Chowk, Rajajipuram, Charbagh
Never two location mentions in one sentence
Conversational — 'Lucknow mein best hai' not 'best dental clinic in Lucknow city'
